title: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: A classic Roman pasta dish made with eggs, cheese, and pancetta.

instructions.title: Boil the pasta
instructions.description: Cook spaghetti in well-salted boiling water until al dente.

instructions.title: Cook the pancetta
instructions.description: Fry pancetta in a large pan over medium heat until crispy.

instructions.title: Combine
instructions.description: Remove pan from heat, add pasta, then stir in egg mixture quickly to avoid scrambling.

title: Margherita Pizza
description: A simple classic Neapolitan pizza with tomato, mozzarella, and basil.

instructions.title: Preheat oven
instructions.description: Heat oven to its maximum temperature, at least 250°C, with a baking tray inside.

instructions.title: Prepare the base
instructions.description: Stretch the dough out thin and spread tomato sauce evenly, leaving a border for the crust.

instructions.title: Add toppings and bake
instructions.description: Add mozzarella and bake for 10-15 minutes until crust is golden. Top with fresh basil.
